title: Shining Fatherland

tokens.lyric: Sunlight beaming forth in the East, from th

lines.raw: [Bm]Sunlight beaming forth in the East, from th[Em]e Fatherland;[Bm]
Bringing tid[G]ings of [D]a new world to famili[Em]es in the field[D].
[Em]Let us hasten to send[Bm] the news all [F#m]throughou[Em7]t the world[F#m],   [A7]
[D]Eden's gl[G]ory sp[A]reading forev[Bm]er the ho[Em]pe of joy and peac[D]e.
[D]Tells the t[G]idings[A] of the [Bm]rising[Em] sun that brings us [D]life.

tokens.lyric: Harvest quickly men of the fields, hasten to harvest now;

lines.raw: Harvest quickly men of the fields, hasten to harvest now;

tokens.lyric: Crops are ripened and ready to bring into the heavenly barn.

lines.raw: Crops are ripened and ready to bring into the heavenly barn.

tokens.lyric: Saints and angels and heavenly hosts gather to speed the task;

lines.raw: Saints and angels and heavenly hosts gather to speed the task;

tokens.lyric: All will share the harvest of joy at the banquet of our Lord.

lines.raw: All will share the harvest of joy at the banquet of our Lord.

tokens.lyric: When the woes of six thousand years are gone from the Father's heart,

lines.raw: When the woes of six thousand years are gone from the Father's heart,

tokens.lyric: Sons and daughters shall live with great joy, our True Parents' own

lines.raw: Sons and daughters shall live with great joy, our True Parents' own

tokens.lyric: Saints and sages and men of good faith all waited for this day;

lines.raw: Saints and sages and men of good faith all waited for this day;

tokens.lyric: Loyal men of hope and fidelity yearned to see this day.

lines.raw: Loyal men of hope and fidelity yearned to see this day.
